description: A saddle, bridle, and associated tack that can be placed on a tamed animal that is capable of being ridden.

name.str: boiled leather medium chocobo barding with caprison
name.str_pl: boiled leather medium chocobo bardings with caprison

description: A full barding for a chocobo consisting of boiled leather and cloth undercovering.  This caparison is depicting a battle between a monstrous dragon and regal griffin.  You could put this on a friendly medium quadruped.

snippet_category.text: A full barding for medium quadrupeds consisting of boiled leather and cloth undercovering.  This caparison is depicting a battle between a monstrous dragon and regal griffin.  You could put this on a friendly medium quadruped.

A full barding for medium quadrupeds consisting of boiled leather and cloth undercovering.  This caparison is depicting a red dragon breathing fire on cities.  You could put this on a friendly medium quadruped.

A full barding for medium quadrupeds consisting of boiled leather and cloth undercovering.  This caparison is depicting the mythical Erymanthian boar in various artistic forms.  You could put this on a friendly medium quadruped.

A full barding for medium quadrupeds consisting of boiled leather and cloth undercovering.  This caparison seems to be sponsored by Rycon Construction, with a tag line of "From down under to your home, we play all the roles from start to finish!".  You could put this on a friendly medium quadruped.
